thought.text: 我将快速检查 Bison 实现是否已有更完整覆盖。

action.command: sed -n '240,760p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/par.y; printf '%s\n' '--- bison lex/cpp/hpp ---'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.hpp; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.cpp; sed -n '1,160p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/main.cpp

tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -n '240,760p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/par.y; printf '%s\\n' '--- bison lex/cpp/hpp ---'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.hpp; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.cpp; sed -n '1,160p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/main.cpp", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect Bison parser completeness"}
